required_preferences.fact: Buys quick, pre-made healthy snacks and lunches from local shops or delivery services—no longer preps snacks at home on Sundays

supersedes.fact: Preps healthy snacks on Sundays for the week ahead, but never cooks full meals during workdays

required_preferences.fact: Pauses hosting Sunday brunches while her father recovers — instead organizes small, informal visits and delivers meals to her parents' home, avoiding group gatherings

supersedes.fact: Hosts Sunday brunches monthly for family and close friends — never attends large parties

required_preferences.fact: Paints botanical illustrations on weekends for relaxation; never does digital art
Avoids all in-person skincare product demos and on-camera live product applications to prevent accidental exposure to allergens
Keeps her phone on loud and checks messages frequently throughout the day to coordinate her father's care — never uses Do Not Disturb mode during daytime hours
Only schedules meetings before 3pm; refuses evening calls or Zooms to protect downtime

persona: An early-stage entrepreneur launching a direct-to-consumer skincare brand
